title: Auto Fish Premium
description: A smart client-side fishing automation utility featuring anti-cheat delay simulation, auto-eating, and durability protection.
body:
**Auto Fish Premium (Fabric 1.21.11)**
Let's be honest: vanilla Minecraft fishing is a chore. Standing around waiting for bubbles while staring at a pixelated bobber isn't exactly peak gameplay.

Auto Fish Premium turns your fishing rod into a fully automated loot-farming machine. Just cast your line once, step away from your keyboard, and let the mod handle the rest. Because it works 100% on the client side, you don't need to install anything on the server, just plug it into your client profile and watch the treasure roll in.
**
 What Makes It "Premium"?**
Most basic fishing bots are robotic, obvious, and get your tools broken. This mod is built to look smart and act human.

 **Audio-Perfect Reflexes**: No more dealing with laggy visual glitches or missed catches. The mod listens directly to game sound packets, instantly hooking the fish the exact millisecond it splashes.

 **Mind Your Own Bobber**: Fishing near friends? No problem. The built-in 3D proximity matcher calculates exact coordinates so the mod only reels in when your line gets a bite, completely ignoring everyone else.

 **Human-like Reflexes (Anti-Ban)**: Standard bots recast at the exact same millisecond every single time, a massive red flag for server anti-cheats. Auto Fish Premium uses a smart delay scheduler that randomizes your reaction times (between 900ms and 1400ms) to look perfectly natural.

 **The God-Rod Saver**: Got a rare Mending or God-tier enchanted fishing rod? Relax. The Emergency Durability Guard constantly monitors your tool's health. If it drops below 5 durability, the mod forces an emergency shut-off and alerts you in chat so your prized gear never breaks.

 **Automated Snack Breaks**: Don't starve while away from your desk. The mod tracks your hunger bar automatically. If it gets low, it seamlessly swaps to a food item on your hotbar, holds down right-click to eat, and snaps right back to fishing the second you're full.

⌨️ Instant On/Off Toggle: Want to fish manually for a bit? Just tap the H key in-game to instantly freeze or activate the automation loop, complete with a clean overlay notification right above your hotbar.

Use the J Key to open Settings.

⚙️ Setup is Simple
Getting started takes less than a minute. Just drop it into your mods folder alongside:

Minecraft 1.21.11

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

Cast your line once, grab a snack, and come back to a chest full of enchanted books, saddles, and loot!
